publications.title: Regulation of chromatin conformation by the histone deubiquitinase BAP1 in the brain
publications.description: BAP1 loss disrupts chromatin state through a pathway of elevated H2AK119ub, which collapses long-range developmental loops, replacing them with proximal repressive contacts. Through Hi-C, we find genome-wide dysregulation of 3D organization.

publications.title: Coordinated methylation and hydroxymethylation changes at gene bodies after BAP1 loss
publications.description: BAP1 loss disrupts active demethylation in neurons, causing a simultaneous increase in 5mC and decrease of 5hmC at neuronal and synaptic gene loci associated with neurodevelopment. We observe MeCP2 binding strongly to non-CG methylation.
